title: Hello!
text: This webpage was put together for students of ENVS255 to act as a resource for their indiviudal projects, but will hopefully be useful for anyone starting to work with QGIS and R.

title: Tracking Data
text: Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see https://quarto.org.
